Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.plugins

Interface ClientRegistrationI

All Superinterfaces:
fr.sorbonne_u.components.PluginI, Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
ClientRegistrationPlugin
public interface ClientRegistrationI extends fr.sorbonne_u.components.PluginI
The class ClientRegistrationI

Description

Invariants

 invariant      true        // no more invariant

Created on : 2026-02-04

  • Method Details

    • registered

      boolean registered()
      return true if the component has already been registered, otherwise false.

      Contract

       pre    true        // no precondition.
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Returns:
      true if the component has already been registered, otherwise false.

    • registered

      boolean registered(RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc) throws UnknownClientException
      return true if the component has already been registered with service class rc, otherwise false.

      Contract

       pre    rc != null
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      rc - the registration class.
      Returns:
      true if receptionPortURI has already been registered with service class rc, otherwise false.
      Throws:
      UnknownClientException - when the component is not registered yet.

    • register

      void register(RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc) throws AlreadyRegisteredException
      register on the publication/subscription system with service class rc.

      Contract

       pre    rc != null
 post   registered(rc)
      Parameters:
      rc - the required registration class.
      Throws:
      AlreadyRegisteredException - when the component is already registered.

    • modifyServiceClass

      void modifyServiceClass(RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc) throws UnknownClientException, AlreadyRegisteredException
      upgrade or degrade the registration to the class rc, returning a new URI of an inbound port offering the component interface PublishingCI.

      Contract

       pre    rc != null
 post   registered(rc)
      Parameters:
      rc - the required registration class.
      Throws:
      UnknownClientException - when the component is not registered yet.
      AlreadyRegisteredException - when the component is already registered with the service class rc.

    • unregister

      void unregister() throws UnknownClientException
      unregister from the publication/subscription system.

      Contract

       pre    true        // no precondition.
 post   !registered()
      Throws:
      UnknownClientException - when the component is not registered yet.

    • onBrokerDisconnect

      default void onBrokerDisconnect(String reason)
      Hook invoked when the client detects that its connection to the broker has been lost (e.g. broker JVM crash, network partition, abnormal termination from the other side). The default implementation is a no-op so existing subclasses are unaffected; new subclasses may override it to release per-session state, schedule a reconnection attempt, or notify the application.

      this is purely a Java-side hook on the plugin interface; it does not appear on any BCM ComponentInterface (RegistrationCI, ReceivingCI). The actual broker→client disconnect detection is out of scope for this phase — only the API surface is added.

      Parameters:
      reason - human-readable explanation of the disconnect cause, or null if unknown.
